title: StructAI: AI-Powered Civil Engineering Platform for Colombia
description: StructAI is a freemium SaaS platform that provides AI-assisted engineering calculations with full normative traceability for Colombian civil engineering standards (NSR-10, RAS 2000 / Res. 0330-2017, INVIAS, NTC, SGSST). It integrates six domain engines — unit price analysis (APU), structural mechanics, water and sanitation (AquAI), geotechnics (GeoPot), road design (Vías), and project management (Gerencia) — with a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipeline that cites the exact norm, chapter, and article for every answer. The system uses local multilingual embeddings (sentence-transformers) stored in pgvector (Supabase/PostgreSQL) and Groq as the LLM synthesis backend. The web application (Next.js 14 App Router) is deployed on Vercel; the API layer (FastAPI, Python) exposes the six engines. Internal codebase name: Construdata.
